zh.Holme, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anconetta de la Twyer於1234年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅時，她的父親Peter de la Twyer30歲，母親Mrs. Peter de la Twyer25歲。她於1268年12月24日與John Holmes在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1288年之後在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Twyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Tower
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a tower, usually a defensive fortification or watchtower, from Middle English, Old French tūr (from Latin turris).

English: occupational name for someone who dressed white leather, cured with alum rather than tanned with bark, from an agent derivative of Middle English taw(en) (Old English tawian ‘to prepare, make ready’).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Anconetta de la Twyer was born in 1234, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Peter de la Twyer, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. Peter de la Twyer, was 25. She married John Holmes on 24 December 1268, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died after 1288, in England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Anconetta de la Twyer(이)가 1234년 영국 링코실르 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter de la Twyer(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Peter de la Twyer(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1268년 12월 24일 영국 링코실르 홀에서 John Holmes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1288년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anconetta de la Twyer родилась в 1234 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter de la Twyer было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Peter de la Twyer, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Holmes 24 декабря 1268 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1288 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания.
